mood: Command-center focus, high energy, tactical athleticism

surfaces_and_borders.inputs: bg-[#1C1C1E] border border-white/10 rounded-xl text-white focus:border-[#FF3B30] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30]
surfaces_and_borders.buttons_primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold rounded-xl active:scale-95 transition-transform
surfaces_and_borders.buttons_secondary: bg-[#1C1C1E] text-white border border-white/20 font-bold rounded-xl active:scale-95 transition-transform

trainer_avatar.description: Portrait of a male gym trainer under vibrant blue neon lights
trainer_avatar.usage: Use as the avatar for the Trainer AI Persona in chat and dashboard.

nutritionist_avatar.description: Smiling doctor holding a green apple
nutritionist_avatar.usage: Use as the avatar for the Nutritionist AI Persona.

buddy_avatar.description: Smiling bald African American man outdoors
buddy_avatar.usage: Use as the avatar for the Buddy AI Persona.

dummy_meal_screenshot.description: Chicken dinner with broccoli and carrots
dummy_meal_screenshot.usage: Use as a placeholder for the user's uploaded mess menu screenshot.

hero_background.description: Dark atmospheric gym with neon lighting
hero_background.usage: Use as a background layer (with bg-black/60 overlay) for the top dashboard header.

icons.style: stroke-width-2, solid and bold outlines for better visibility against dark backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo application, but adapt Tailwind classes using standard React Native styles or NativeWind depending on the boilerplate.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for large background areas; use #0A0A0A (Deep Obsidian) to avoid heavy eye strain.
All AI chat screens must feature the respective persona avatars assigned in the media section.
Use Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) for Call-to-Action buttons, progress bars, and active tabs.
Add test IDs (`data-testid` equivalent in RN `testID`) to all interactive elements, e.g., `testID='log-workout-btn'`.
Ensure input fields (e.g., reps, weights, measurements) use dark elevated surfaces (#1C1C1E) with a subtle white border.
The dashboard should have a 'Control Room' dense layout for metrics (calories, workouts, body stats) using 2-column or 3-column tight grids.
